QF.id: Evaluating Fund Performance and Fund Selection_9

question.text: An NPS fund manager can charge a maximum fund management fee of:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** NPS has one of the lowest fund management costs in the world, capped at 0.01% (1 basis point) of assets under management. **The Trap:** Candidates often confuse NPS fees with mutual fund expense ratios (which can be 1-2.5%). The extremely low 0.01% is a unique feature of NPS. **Cross-Exam Context:** The low cost structure of NPS is a key differentiator and is frequently tested. It makes NPS one of the most cost-efficient retirement savings vehicles. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Highlight the 0.01% fee cap when explaining NPS advantages to clients — over 30 years, this cost advantage compounds into significantly higher corpus.
